# UiHost.DialectValidationFailure enumeration

Why a dialect message failed validation.

```csharp
public enum DialectValidationFailure
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| None | `0` | No failure (the message is valid). |
| MalformedFraming | `1` | The message failed §3 JSON-RPC framing; the host MUST NOT act on it. |
| UnknownMethod | `2` | The message names a method that is not a verbatim dialect name. |
